# AgelessLabs.ai

> AI-powered longevity biomarker analysis. Understand what your lab results reveal about how long you'll live.

AgelessLabs.ai is a longevity-focused platform that interprets blood test results through a longevity lens. The site combines a free AI biomarker analysis tool with a library of evidence-based reference content on longevity biomarkers and healthspan optimization.

## What this site covers

- **AI Biomarker Interpreter** — free tool at /analyze. Users upload or paste lab results; the AI returns a longevity score (0–100), per-marker status (optimal / monitor / concern), narrative summary, and prioritized recommendations.
- **Biomarker Reference Library** — /biomarkers/ — 42 pages covering ApoB, HbA1c, hsCRP, Vitamin D, Testosterone, Homocysteine, Ferritin, TSH, IGF-1, Fasting Insulin, Triglycerides, Omega-3 Index, LDL/HDL Cholesterol, Cortisol, Uric Acid, Creatinine/eGFR, Albumin, Lipoprotein(a), ALT/AST, Magnesium, Vitamin B12, DHEA-S, PSA, Free Testosterone, SHBG, Estradiol, GGT, Fibrinogen, Cystatin C, Folate, Apolipoprotein A1, Zinc, CBC, Selenium, High-Sensitivity Troponin, TMAO, Lp-PLA2, Adiponectin, Leptin, Coenzyme Q10, Galectin-3, and NMR Lipoprofile. Each page covers definition, why it matters for longevity, standard vs. longevity-optimal ranges, interventions, and testing options.

## Audience

Health-conscious adults aged 35–65 who track biomarkers and are focused on longevity optimization.

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://agelesslabs.ai/
- AI tool: https://agelesslabs.ai/analyze
- Biomarker index: https://agelesslabs.ai/biomarkers/
- About: https://agelesslabs.ai/about
- Sitemap: https://agelesslabs.ai/sitemap.xml

## Content standards

All biomarker content includes longevity-optimized reference ranges and citations to primary research (PubMed, clinical guidelines). Content is written by Dan Carey, Founder of AgelessLabs. For informational purposes only — not medical advice.
